companion_files.name: PLAN.md
companion_files.content:
# Plan - Performance Big Wins Sweep

## Document Status

- Last updated: 2026-02-20
- Feature: Frontend/backend high-impact performance gains
- Scope: Reduce repeated provider-sidecar guard calls and trim analyzer DB reconciliation load without changing behavior
- Planning maturity: `Spec Outline` complete, `Refined Spec` complete, `Detailed Implementation Plan` complete
- Implementation approval: Active (user requested more performance opportunities and asked to carry on)

## Spec Outline

1. Remove repeated availability/auth guard overhead on high-frequency streaming routes.
2. Reduce idle DB query pressure from analyzer reconciliation loops.
3. Preserve existing API behavior and auth/error semantics.

## Refined Spec

1. Add short TTL + in-flight dedupe caching for sidecar health/enabled checks and per-user OAuth session checks.
2. Add keep-alive HTTP agents for sidecar axios clients to cut handshake overhead.
3. Add adaptive reconciliation backoff in `services/audio-analyzer/analyzer.py` to reduce repeated pending-track scans while idle.

## Detailed Implementation Plan (Atomic Tasks)

### Task 1: Provider guard caching and keep-alive
- Status: Complete
- Acceptance criteria:
  - `backend/src/services/tidalStreaming.ts` and `backend/src/services/youtubeMusic.ts` use keep-alive agents.
  - `isAvailable`/enabled checks avoid repeated work within short TTL windows.
- Completion summary:
  - Added keep-alive HTTP/HTTPS agents in `backend/src/services/tidalStreaming.ts` and `backend/src/services/youtubeMusic.ts`.
  - Added short TTL + in-flight dedupe caching for `isAvailable` in both services and `isEnabled` in TIDAL service.

### Task 2: OAuth-session check caching on routes
- Status: Complete
- Acceptance criteria:
  - `backend/src/routes/tidalStreaming.ts` and `backend/src/routes/youtubeMusic.ts` avoid per-request sidecar auth status calls for the same authenticated user within short TTL windows.
  - Cache invalidation occurs on auth clear/failure paths.
- Completion summary:
  - Added per-user OAuth session cache + in-flight dedupe in `backend/src/routes/tidalStreaming.ts` and `backend/src/routes/youtubeMusic.ts`.
  - Added cache invalidation/update on auth save/poll/clear and auth-failure paths.
  - Added test-environment TTL guardrails so runtime tests stay deterministic.
  - Added user-quality lookup caching for TIDAL stream info/stream routes (disabled in test mode).

### Task 3: Analyzer reconciliation backoff
- Status: Complete
- Acceptance criteria:
  - `services/audio-analyzer/analyzer.py` runs DB reconciliation less frequently when repeatedly idle.
  - Pending work discovery still resumes promptly when work returns.
- Completion summary:
  - Added adaptive DB reconciliation scheduling in `services/audio-analyzer/analyzer.py` with env-configurable min/max/backoff values.
  - Worker now exponentially backs off reconciliation when idle and resets to fast cadence when work is found.

### Task 4: Verification and close-out
- Status: Complete
- Acceptance criteria:
  - Targeted backend route runtime tests pass (TIDAL + YT routes).
  - Python analyzer syntax validation passes.
  - `npm run agent:preflight` passes.
- Completion summary:
  - Passed `npm --prefix backend test -- --runTestsByPath src/routes/__tests__/tidalStreamingRuntime.test.ts`.
  - Passed `npm --prefix backend test -- --runTestsByPath src/routes/__tests__/youtubeMusicRuntime.test.ts`.
  - Passed `python3 -m py_compile services/audio-analyzer/analyzer.py`.
  - Passed `npm --prefix backend run build`.

### Task 5: Thumbs interaction latency reduction
- Status: Complete
- Acceptance criteria:
  - Thumbs interactions update UI immediately without waiting for network completion.
  - Track-preference optimistic updates are covered by a targeted unit test.
- Completion summary:
  - Added `frontend/hooks/trackPreferenceOptimistic.ts` and switched `frontend/hooks/useTrackPreference.ts` to use non-blocking optimistic cache updates (no wait on query cancellation).
  - Added `frontend/tests/unit/useTrackPreference.test.ts` to lock optimistic score/state mapping and non-blocking update behavior.
  - Passed `npm --prefix frontend run test:unit -- tests/unit/useTrackPreference.test.ts`.
  - Passed `npm --prefix frontend run lint -- hooks/useTrackPreference.ts hooks/trackPreferenceOptimistic.ts tests/unit/useTrackPreference.test.ts`.

### Task 6: CLAP progress and stuck-state hardening
- Status: Complete
- Acceptance criteria:
  - CLAP progress cannot show 100% while pending work remains.
  - CLAP failed counts are derived from track status to avoid phantom pending items.
  - Queue push failures do not leave tracks marked as processing.
- Completion summary:
  - Updated `backend/src/workers/unifiedEnrichment.ts` to compute CLAP failed counts from `Track.vibeAnalysisStatus='failed'` and clamp stage progress under 100 while pending/processing/queued work remains.
  - Updated CLAP queueing flow in `backend/src/workers/unifiedEnrichment.ts` to set `vibeAnalysisStatus='processing'` only after successful Redis enqueue.
  - Updated `services/audio-analyzer-clap/analyzer.py` to stamp `vibeAnalysisStatusUpdatedAt` on status and failure writes.
  - Added backend regressions in `backend/src/workers/__tests__/unifiedEnrichmentRuntime.test.ts` for progress clamping, failed-count source-of-truth, and queue-push failure behavior.
  - Passed `npm --prefix backend test -- --runTestsByPath src/workers/__tests__/unifiedEnrichmentRuntime.test.ts`.
  - Passed `npm --prefix backend run build`.
  - Passed `python3 -m py_compile services/audio-analyzer-clap/analyzer.py`.
